features.name: Upgrade project to Java 21
features.description: Upgrade maven properties to target Java 21.

features.name: Implement Baseline Test Suite
features.description: Create unit and integration tests for controllers, repositories, and mapper to establish a safety net for upgrades.

features.name: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.x
features.description: Update spring-boot-starter-parent version to latest 3.x and add starter validation.

features.name: Migrate javax.* to jakarta.*
features.description: Change all javax.persistence and javax.validation imports to jakarta namespace.

features.name: Convert ViewModels to Java Records
features.description: Refactor EmployeeViewModel and SkillViewModel to use Java Records for immutability.

features.name: Decouple Mapper from Repositories
features.description: Move database lookup queries out of the Mapper translation methods to make it a pure mapper.

features.name: Migrate tests to JUnit 5
features.description: Convert JUnit 4 tests to JUnit Jupiter tests.

features.name: Implement Global Exception Handling
features.description: Create RestControllerAdvice to format validation and search errors using RFC 9457 Problem Details.

features.name: Configure Quality Lenses (Mutation Testing & CRAP)
features.description: Evaluate test suite strength with mutation testing and check complexity of core functions.

features.name: Extract Domain Knowledge
features.description: Identify implicit business rules and extract them into an authoritative knowledge doc to avoid duplicated knowledge.
